name: Rook
visualHook: Binocular gloss and cheap coffee stains — someone who lives in vans and rooftops. Unremarkable clothes; memorable posture: too still.
roleInPlot: Episodes 1–2: eyes on the pulse zone and early powered activity — the 'shadowy organization watching' from Ep 1; crosshair on Wraith/Surge friction in Ep 2.
outcome: Does not fight to win publicly — extracts intel and vanishes. Survives; may recur as background threat.
